records.notes: v0.3.0rc1 parsed the public simple-text fixture successfully with explicit stage success and fallback.used=false. The externally managed service did not expose immutable model or runtime revisions, so this remains a functional verification rather than a reproducible certification.

v0.3.0rc1 passed both public fixtures with layout, recognition, and output stages successful and fallback.used=false. Evidence is valid only for the pinned NVIDIA vLLM image with MinerULogitsProcessor; broader quality approval remains open.

v0.3.0rc1 passed both public fixtures with layout, recognition, and output stages successful and fallback.used=false. The isolated test overlay used sglang-kernel 0.4.4 on the pinned SGLang source revision, but no immutable runtime image exists and narrow-receipt table quality remains weak.
